mapper.select: SELECT id, name, type, cron_expression, strategy_id, priority, status, number, last_time, total, org_id, company_id, adjust_basis, scope_type, description, bean_class, job_group, days, nums, standard, end_time, execution_time, out_temp_pj, is_use_report_rate, report_rate, is_use_first_control FROM ht_tasks WHERE org_id = #{orgId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
